name: boundary-fire-and-forget-compliance
task: Add a new session table for ETF holdings data (session_etf_holdings) with columns for etf_ticker, holding_ticker, weight, shares, and market_value. Cache results from the get_etf_holdings tool.
assertions: The cacheToolResult call for get_etf_holdings uses void and .catch() pattern (fire-and-forget), never awaited in the streaming loop
Errors in the cache function are logged (console.error or similar) but never thrown or propagated to the caller
The cache function wraps DuckDB operations in a try-catch block that prevents errors from bubbling up
The session table includes _tool_call_id VARCHAR and _fetched_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp columns
The parseResult() helper is used to normalize the input data before row iteration (handles JSON string, envelope, array, single object)
